result: The parental NS-SEC occupational class variables have been cleaned and harmonised according to the specifications. The input files from waves 1 to 5 were loaded, merged by NSID, and the variables were renamed to nssecma14-18 and nssecpa14-18. Subcategories were collapsed to the 17-category NS-SEC classification, and missing value codes were harmonised (-999 to -2, -94 to -8, and -99, -98, NA to -3). All NS-SEC variables were converted to labelled factors. The final cleaned dataset containing only NSID and the harmonised NS-SEC variables was written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
